opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My chest and back are completely covered in these red, scaly spots. It exploded overnight, and I'm terrified it's a severe allergic reaction or something contagious.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: A sudden widespread scaly rash on my trunk overnight — I'm scared it's an allergy or contagious.

symptom_narrative.onset: single large patch ~10 days ago after a mild cold, then widespread eruption over 24-48h
symptom_narrative.character: oval salmon/red scaly spots with a fine inner rim of scale
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: moderate itch, worse with sweating; very anxious
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: chest, back and abdomen; face/palms/soles clear
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: explosive spread after a herald patch
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: mild sore throat/fatigue ~10 days ago; first single patch I thought was ringworm; no mouth sores

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: mild cold/sore throat about 10 days ago

objective_data_offered.value: a single larger oval scaly patch on the flank, then lots of smaller oval salmon-coloured spots across the chest/back with a fine rim of scale just inside the edge, following the skin lines; face, palms and soles are clear; no mouth sores
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: camera view; cannot examine mucosa/nodes or do serology
